text.title: User Control and Freedom Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) that pins the shape of a valid control-audit artefact. Subagents validate against this before returning.

example.code: { "artefact_id": "control-audit-settings-2026-05-23", "owner": "Maria Yuskiv <maria@faion.net>", "version": "1.0.0", "last_reviewed": "2026-05-23", "focus_trap_verified": true, "actions": [ { "screen": "/settings/account", "action": "delete-account", "reversibility": "irreversible", "undo_available": false, "cancel_available": true, "exit_mechanism": ["x-button", "escape-key", "click-outside"], "recovery_method": "support contact within 30 days", "severity": 0, "fix_direction": "OK (irreversible + confirmation + 30-day recovery)" } ] }

example.note: Owner plural; focus_trap_verified=false but artefact still produced; irreversible-no-undo with severity 0 (must be 1).

forbidden.pattern: An entry with `reversibility=irreversible` AND `undo_available=false` AND `cancel_available=false` MUST have severity 1.
A modal action with fewer than 3 entries in `exit_mechanism` (excluding "none").
A reversible routine action with "confirmation" recovery_method (confirmation fatigue).
